Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Exports the contents of a grid (using the selected order and filters) to an Excel file. LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'OpenDocument'
&CellRow = 1 &FirstColumn = 1
Do 'LoadGridState'
Do 'WriteFilters'
Do 'WriteColumnTitles'
Do 'WriteData'
Do 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Sub 'OpenDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&Random = Random() * 10000 &Filename = !"ExportWWCliente-" + &Random.ToString().Trim() + !".xlsx"
&ExcelDocument.Open(&Filename) Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteFilters'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not (&FiltroPesRaz.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Razão") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&FiltroPesRaz) EndIf
If not (&PesCod.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Código") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCod EndIf
If not (&PesSts.IsEmpty() AND &PesIsCli.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Sts") If Not &PesSts.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesSts.EnumerationDescription() Endif &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = '' do Case Case &PesIsCli.ToString().Trim() = "true" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "Somente Clientes"
Case &PesIsCli.ToString().Trim() = "false" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = " Todas Pessoas"
EndCase EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód.Ramo Atv." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatNom1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nom.Ramo Atv." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&RatNom1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCLITRACOD' &PesCliTraCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCliTraCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Transportadora" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCliTraCod1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome.Fantas." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesFan1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesUltVenDta1.IsEmpty() OR not &PesUltVenDta_To1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Ult.Compra" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesUltVenDta1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "até" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesUltVenDta_To1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESDTAULTCOM' &PesDtaUltCom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesDtaUltCom_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesDtaUltCom1.IsEmpty() OR not &PesDtaUltCom_To1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Ult. Combinado" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesDtaUltCom1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "WWP_MiddleText" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesDtaUltCom_To1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESLOG' &PesLog1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesLog1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Logradouro" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesLog1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESBAI' &PesBai1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesBai1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Bairro" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesBai1) EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód.Ramo Atv." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatNom2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nom.Ramo Atv." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&RatNom2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCLITRACOD' &PesCliTraCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCliTraCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Transportadora" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCliTraCod2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome.Fantas." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesFan2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesUltVenDta2.IsEmpty() OR not &PesUltVenDta_To2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Ult.Compra" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesUltVenDta2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "até" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesUltVenDta_To2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESDTAULTCOM' &PesDtaUltCom2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesDtaUltCom_To2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesDtaUltCom2.IsEmpty() OR not &PesDtaUltCom_To2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Ult. Combinado" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesDtaUltCom2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "WWP_MiddleText" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesDtaUltCom_To2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESLOG' &PesLog2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesLog2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Logradouro" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesLog2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESBAI' &PesBai2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesBai2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Bairro" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesBai2) EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód.Ramo Atv." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatNom3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nom.Ramo Atv." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&RatNom3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCLITRACOD' &PesCliTraCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCliTraCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Transportadora" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCliTraCod3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome.Fantas." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesFan3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesUltVenDta3.IsEmpty() OR not &PesUltVenDta_To3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Ult.Compra" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesUltVenDta3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "até" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesUltVenDta_To3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESDTAULTCOM' &PesDtaUltCom3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesDtaUltCom_To3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesDtaUltCom3.IsEmpty() OR not &PesDtaUltCom_To3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Ult. Combinado" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesDtaUltCom3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "WWP_MiddleText" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesDtaUltCom_To3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESLOG' &PesLog3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesLog3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Logradouro" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesLog3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESBAI' &PesBai3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesBai3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Bairro" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesBai3) EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf &CellRow += 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteColumnTitles'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&VisibleColumnCount = 0 If &Session.Get(!'WWClienteColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWClienteColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf
For &ColumnsSelector_Column in &ColumnsSelector.Columns If &ColumnsSelector_Column.IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = GetMessageText(iif(&ColumnsSelector_Column.DisplayName.IsEmpty(), &ColumnsSelector_Column.ColumnName, &ColumnsSelector_Column.DisplayName)) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Color = 11 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
For each order EmpCod PesRaz using DSWWCliente(&FiltroPesRaz, &PesCod, &PesSts, &PesIsCli, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &PesCpf1 , &RatCod1, &RatNom1, &PesCliTraCod1, &PesCidCod1, &PesCidNom1, &PesCidUfeCod1 , &PesFan1, &PesUltVenDta1, &PesUltVenDta_To1, &PesDtaUltCom1, &PesDtaUltCom_To1, &PesLog1 , &PesBai1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &PesCpf2, &RatCod2, &RatNom2 , &PesCliTraCod2, &PesCidCod2, &PesCidNom2, &PesCidUfeCod2, &PesFan2, &PesUltVenDta2 , &PesUltVenDta_To2, &PesDtaUltCom2, &PesDtaUltCom_To2, &PesLog2, &PesBai2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 , &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &PesCpf3, &RatCod3, &RatNom3, &PesCliTraCod3, &PesCidCod3 , &PesCidNom3, &PesCidUfeCod3, &PesFan3, &PesUltVenDta3, &PesUltVenDta_To3, &PesDtaUltCom3 , &PesDtaUltCom_To3, &PesLog3, &PesBai3)
// Write cell values &CellRow += 1
Do 'BeforeWriteLine' &VisibleColumnCount = 0 If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = PesCod &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(PesRaz) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible = True &gridPesFan = iif(PesFan.Length() > 30, Substr(PesFan,1, 30) + '...', PesFan) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&gridPesFan) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible = True &GridPesTipPessoa = PesIsCli &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &GridPesTipPessoa.ToString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible = True &gridPesCidNom = PesCidUfeCod.Trim() +' / '+ PesCidNom.Trim()
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&gridPesCidNom) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible = True If PesTip = 'J' //JURIDICA &CpfCnpj = PesCnpj Else &CpfCnpj = PesCpf EndIF
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&CpfCnpj) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(RatNom) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(PesPrmFon) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible = True RetornaPrimeiroContato.Call(EmpCod, PesCod, &PesFonCon) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesFonCon) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Date = PesUltVenDta &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
Do 'AfterWriteLine'
Endfor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ExcelDocument.Save() Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Close()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'CheckStatus'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If (&ExcelDocument.ErrCode <> 0) &Filename = "" &ErrorMessage = &ExcelDocument.ErrDescription &ExcelDocument.Close() Return EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesCod", '', !'Código', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesRaz", '', !'Razão Social', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesFan", '', !'Fantasia', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&GridPesTipPessoa", '', !'Cli.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesCidNom", '', !'UF/Cidade', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CpfCnpj", '', !'Cpf/Cnpj', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"RatNom", '', !'Ramo Ativ.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesPrmFon", '', !'Fone', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&PesFonCon", '', !'Contato', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesUltVenDta", '', !'Ult.Compra', False, '')
&UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWClienteColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(!"WWClienteGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"WWClienteGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"WWClienteGridState")) Endif
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTROPESRAZ" &FiltroPesRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESSTS" &PesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESISCLI" &PesIsCli.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'BeforeWriteLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AfterWriteLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
